features.title: Run same prompt across multiple models
acceptance: Same prompt and current chat context are sent to each comparison candidate
One candidate failure does not fail the whole comparison run

features.title: Show speed, token, and error metadata

features.title: Save selected answer as main branch
acceptance: Selected successful answer is appended to active chat with original prompt
